action_set_definitions.name: get_pipeline_context
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves metadata and logs for a specific pipeline execution to identify affected components and the previous stable version.

pipeline_id.description: The unique identifier for the pipeline run (e.g., 'pipe-z-8821').

action_set_definitions.name: manage_zos_load_module
action_set_definitions.description: Performs operations on Z/OS load modules within a Partitioned Data Set (PDS).

dataset_name.description: The PDS containing the load module.

module_name.description: The name of the load module/member.

target_version.description: The version tag or timestamp to restore to.

action_set_definitions.name: manage_db2_plan
action_set_definitions.description: Manages DB2 plan bindings and package synchronization.

plan_name.description: The name of the DB2 plan.

version.description: The target version/collection ID to bind to the plan.

action_set_definitions.name: refresh_cics_resource
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a NEWCOPY or PHASEIN on a program within a specified CICS region to update the in-memory executable.

region_id.description: The identifier for the CICS region (e.g., 'FINREG01').

program_name.description: The name of the program to refresh.

action_set_definitions.name: cleanup_zos_artifacts
action_set_definitions.description: Deletes temporary datasets or artifacts generated during a failed deployment.

artifact_list.description: A list of dataset names or file paths to delete.

action_set_definitions.name: verify_system_consistency
action_set_definitions.description: Checks if the load module, DB2 plan, and CICS region are all running the same version.

state_description.pipeline_id: The unique identifier for the current CI/CD pipeline run.
state_description.current_step: The specific stage where the pipeline is currently halted (e.g., lint, build, unit_test, integration_test, deploy).
state_description.pipeline_status: The current overall status of the pipeline (e.g., failed, in_progress, success).
state_description.repository: State of the source code repository including current commit and branch.
state_description.last_error_log: The raw output or excerpt from the terminal/console that caused the last failure.
state_description.environment_config: Current environment variables and secrets configured for the pipeline.
state_description.infrastructure_state: Status of the underlying resources (e.g., Docker daemon status, Kubernetes cluster health, available disk space).
